overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Japantown, transitioning from a traditional wooden bridge and pagoda area to a bustling urban street with futuristic holographic billboards. The scene blends traditional Japanese architecture with cyberpunk elements under bright sunlight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a wooden bridge toward a traditional pagoda structure

entered.detail: traditional wooden footbridge with railings leading forward
massive concrete highway overpass spanning overhead
Japanese-style wooden gazebo with dark roof
red spherical lanterns hanging from the pagoda structure
wooden fence railings lining both sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden bridge leading toward a traditional Japanese pagoda with red lanterns, set beneath a massive concrete overpass. Sunlight filters through creating dappled shadows on the wooden deck. The environment blends traditional architecture with cyberpunk infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with stone lantern and benches

events.description: character turns right off the wooden bridge into the plaza area
exits covered bridge area into open sunlit gravel plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking through the plaza, passing by NPCs and a stone lantern

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near a bench observing the area
two women conversing near the stone lantern

entered.detail: traditional carved stone lantern in the plaza center
concrete benches along the right side of the plaza
open gravel ground surface of the plaza area
low wooden fence lining the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a sunlit gravel plaza featuring a prominent stone lantern. Two women converse near the lantern while a security guard stands by a bench. The concrete overpass remains visible in the background as the traditional pagoda recedes from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition path with benches and modern buildings

events.description: ground surface changes from gravel to paved asphalt as the path continues toward the main street

agents.ego_description: walking along a paved path passing benches and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man sitting on bench looking at his phone

entered.detail: asphalt pathway replacing the gravel plaza surface
tall contemporary buildings with balconies and large windows
large green holographic advertisement visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path transitions from gravel to paved asphalt as the character moves toward a busier street. A man sits on a bench to the left, and futuristic buildings rise on the right. A large green holographic billboard becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with holographic billboard and pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy street among crowds of pedestrians, passing a woman leaning on the fence

notable_agents.action: woman with purple hair and red outfit leaning against the fence
woman in teal jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: modern street lamp with glowing blue vertical light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a bustling urban street with a large green holographic billboard dominating the left side. The crowd density increases with various pedestrians walking in different directions. Modern street lamps and concrete overpasses frame the scene as the character continues through the Japantown district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a serene, traditional Japanese enclave into a bustling, high-tech urban district. It begins on a wooden bridge beneath a massive concrete overpass, where sunlight filters through red lanterns and a traditional pagoda. As the camera turns right, the wooden deck gives way to a sunlit gravel plaza featuring a stone lantern and idling pedestrians, while the pagoda recedes into the background. The scene then shifts from gravel to paved asphalt as the character moves toward a busier street, with futuristic buildings rising on the right and a large green holographic billboard appearing in the distance. Finally, the environment opens into a crowded urban thoroughfare dominated by the glowing billboard and modern street lamps, fully immersing the viewer in the dense atmosphere of Japantown.
